tests.description: ATDD API tests for Story 2-6 Canonical Timezone Processing Across Intake and Scheduling (RED PHASE)
acceptance_criteria_covered: Given a user with explicit timezone preference (or tenant/system fallback), when date/time fields are created, updated, or rendered, then timestamps are persisted in UTC and displayed in local timezone with deterministic fallback order (user -> tenant -> system).
UI/API contract tests confirm raw UTC strings are not shown on operational screens.

summary: Generated 5 FAILING API tests for Story 2-6
